## Summary

Describe the change in product or contributor terms.

## PR Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation / content-only
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run content:validate` if content or manifests changed
- [ ] `npm run content:validate:audit` or `npm run audit:gate` if gameplay balance/content behavior changed
- [ ] Not applicable (explain below)

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if player-facing behavior or docs map changed
- [ ] CONTRIBUTORS updated if workflows or commands changed
- [ ] Canonical docs updated if architecture, rules, or terminology changed
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Notes

Call out any known follow-up work, intentionally deferred documentation, or remaining edge cases.
